economic_notes: First Nation is a member of Prince Albert Grand Council (PAGC). Owns 99.99% interest in Fort a La Corne Ventures LP (GBE). Active capital projects include flood recovery roads, lagoon expansion, waste transfer station, and school assessment. Significant capital construction underway (assets under construction $11,432,615).
notes: Reporting entity consolidates activities of three First Nation sectors: James Smith Cree Nation, Chakastaypasin Band of the Cree Nation, and Peter Chapman Band on a collective basis only; individual sector activities are excluded. Fort a La Corne Ventures LP is accounted for under modified equity method as a GBE. Large increase in ISC funding from $9.77M to $15.36M year-over-year partly due to capital project funding. Significant TCA additions of $7.82M and disposal of $2.78M in infrastructure. Loan guarantees outstanding of $1.2M related to sector-specific claims. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $15,357,495 + Health Canada $3,492,625 + PAGC $1,672,345 + CMHC $448,677 = $20,971,142 (slight rounding difference noted; used $20,970,842 based on sum). OSR calculated as total revenue $22,311,808 minus government transfers.
